title: French Inspired Beef Skewers
description: A classic French dish with a twist, featuring Argentinian beef skewers with a rich, dark, roasted sauce.
instructions: 2. Thread beef cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together dark roasted sauce, olive oil, and minced garlic.
4. Brush the sauce mixture onto the beef skewers.
5. Season with thyme and salt to taste.
6. Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until cooked to desired doneness.
7. Let skewers rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
8. Serve hot, garnished with fresh thyme if desired.
